ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather data collection */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the day is a holiday */,
  "air_pollution_index" INTEGER /* Air pollution index value */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "wind_direction" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility in miles */,
  "dew_point" INTEGER /* Dew point in degrees Celsius */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "rain_probability" INTEGER /* Probability of rain in percentage */,
  "snow_probability" INTEGER /* Probability of snow in percentage */,
  "cloud_cover" INTEGER /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "weather_type" INTEGER /* Type of weather condition */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the weather data */,
  "pollution_level" TEXT /* Pollution level (low, moderate, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_type FOREIGN KEY ("weather_type") REFERENCES weather_types ("weather_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_is_holiday FOREIGN KEY ("is_holiday") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic record */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the traffic data collection */,
  "traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles counted */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the traffic data */,
  "road_type" TEXT /* Type of road where the traffic data was collected */,
  "traffic_speed" REAL /* Average speed of traffic during the data collection period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the holiday occurs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "weather_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of an icon representing the weather type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., weather, traffic) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city planner, emergency responder) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the data (e.g., API, web interface, mobile app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report's content */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
